{{Quote|That visit unlocked a gateway between our respective regions of space that had been sealed for the previous three thousand years but has remained open ever since. In fact, not long after my initial visit, the Consortium graced Coruscant with a stay, during which you bestowed upon us treasures we had scarcely dreamed existed-rainbow gems, thought puzzles, and trees of wisdom, along with a dozen Star Destroyers you had captured from Imperial warlords who had sought to intrude on your domain.|Leia Organa Solo addresses representatives of the Hapes Consortium|<ref name="Agents" />}}
The '''trees of wisdom''', or '''Selab trees''', were small [[Tree/Legends|trees]] native to [[Selab]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the isolated [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]]. Eating the [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]] of wisdom trees bestowed increased intelligence on elderly [[Sentience/Legends|beings]]; however, some individuals believed the trees to be only a myth. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] was presented with a tree of wisdom as a gift from the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]], part of an attempt to entice her to [[Marriage/Legends|marry]] [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Isolder]] and become the next [[Queen Mother]] of the Cluster. She demurred, although the contact led to the opening of the Hapan borders. The Consortium later gifted a tree of wisdom to the [[Pesktda Xenobotanical Garden]] on [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]], but it was [[Battle of Garqi|burnt]] down during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Biology and appearance==
The [[Tree/Legends|trees]] of wisdom, or Selab trees, were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of small, gnarled tree native to [[Selab]].They gave off a nutty scent, and produced [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]] with a [[Color/Legends|brown]], ruddy peel.<ref name="CoPL1" /> Eating the fruit could greatly increase the intelligence of elderly people.<ref name="SWE" />

==History==
[[File:IsolderEC.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Isolder sought to woo Leia Organa with gifts that included a tree of wisdom.]]
The trees of wisdom grew on Selab,<ref name="CoPL1" /> a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the Interior Region of the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]]. However, with the isolationist Hapes Cluster closing its borders to [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in [[3100 BBY]],<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> many individuals came to regard the trees of wisdom as only a legend.<ref name="SWE" /> This was disproved in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] when a tree of wisdom was included in the gifts presented to [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] as an incentive for her to [[Marriage/Legends|marry]] [[Isolder]], the son of the [[Hapan]] [[Queen Mother]] [[Ta'a Chume]]. The tree was accompanied by twin, floating [[Lamp/Legends|lights]], which regulated its day/night cycle. Organa stored the tree, along with the other Hapan gifts, in her room, but ultimately chose to [[Wedding of Han Solo and Leia Organa/Legends|marry]] former [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] instead of Isolder.<ref name="CoPL1">''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]''</ref>

Following that incident, the Hapan Cluster slowly reopened its borders.<ref name="Atlas" /> They eventually gifted a stunted tree of wisdom to the [[Pesktda Xenobotanical Garden]] on the planet [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]]. The garden included several other exotic botanical specimens, including a grove of [[bafforr tree]]s from [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], it was discovered that the [[Vonduun Skerr Kyrric|Vonduun crab armor]] worn by the extra-galactic invaders, the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], was allergic to bafforr pollen. In order to hide such a militarily significant discovery from the Yuuzhan Vong, the Garqi [[Resistance (Garqi)|Resistance]] [[Battle of Garqi|burned]] the entire Xenobotanical Garden, including the tree of wisdom.<ref name="Geo52">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref>

Later that same [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Organa visited the Hapes Cluster hoping to enlist the Hapans' aid in the war against the Yuuzhan Vong. While addressing an assembly of Hapan representatives, she recalled their earlier gifts, specifically referring to her tree of wisdom.<ref name="Agents">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[Dave Wolverton]] created the trees of wisdom for his novel ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'', published by [[Bantam Spectra]] in [[1994]]. While it was unclear in the book whether the tree's fruit was able to boost intelligence, an entry in the ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' in [[1998]] confirmed it. [[James Luceno]] referenced the tree in his novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'', published by [[Del Rey]] in [[2000]]. The trees were again mentioned in ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'', published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] in [[2004]]. ''The Courtship of Princess Leia'' and ''Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse'' referred interchangeably to the tree as a "tree of wisdom" and a "wisdom tree," while ''Star Wars Encyclopedia'' and ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[2008]], only used the former name. ''Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds'' referred to it as a "wisdom-tree."
